title: antidesma heterophyllum
intro: Antidesma heterophyllum, also known as the 'False Millettia', is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Antidesma heterophyllum is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or poultices, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
